_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to settings.local.json (gitignored) and customize. Personal hooks like Telegram-notify, auto-restart, or auto-typecheck belong here so they don't affect other contributors. Settings.local.json is merged on top of settings.json at load time.

permissions._comment: Add personal allow/deny rules here. The team-shared baseline is in settings.json — you don't need to repeat it.

hooks._comment: Examples below. Delete the ones you don't want. All script paths use ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} so they work from any clone location.
